en.welcome:
Welcome to Inter Ethiopia Solutions Agent Registration Bot

Please choose your application type below.
en.support:
For support, contact Inter Ethiopia Solutions
Email: agentapply@interethiopia.com
Phone: 0911238865 or 0911238865
WhatsApp: 0911238865 or 0911238865
en.choose_language: Please choose your language / ቋንቋ ይምረጡ
en.submitted: Your application has been submitted successfully.
en.timeline: Our team will respond within 3-5 business days.
en.status_not_found: No application found yet. Use /register to submit your application.
en.status_found:
Your application status: {status}
Our team will contact you soon.
en.terms_required: Please type I Agree to continue or Cancel to stop.
en.file_required: Please upload a file or image.
en.file_too_large: File too large. Max size is {size}MB.
en.file_unsupported: Unsupported file format. Please upload JPG, PNG, or PDF.
en.territory_unavailable: Sorry, this area is already reserved. Please select another nearby area.
en.register_choose_type: Choose your application type: Sales Agent / Installer Agent / Sales + Installer Agent
en.admin_menu_text:
Admin management menu:
- View Recent Applications
- Filter Applications
- Update Application Status
- Add Admin User
- Admin Dashboard Link
en.admin_only_management: Only bot admins can access admin management.
en.prompt_phone: Please enter your mobile number (Ethiopian format, e.g. +2519XXXXXXXX or 09XXXXXXXX).
en.prompt_experience_years: If yes, how many years? If no, type 0.
en.prompt_work_type: What type of work do you do?
en.prompt_has_shop: Do you have a shop or business? (Yes/No)
en.prompt_id_front: Please upload your National ID front image/document.
en.prompt_id_back: Please upload your National ID back image/document.
en.prompt_profile_photo: Please upload profile photo (optional). Type skip to continue.
en.prompt_preferred_territory: Select or type your preferred territory (same town/village or nearby area).
en.prompt_terms_reply: Reply with: I Agree or Cancel
en.admin_text_input_required: Please provide text input for the admin action.
en.admin_filter_format: Use format: region|applicant_type|status, or type Cancel.
en.top_matches_found: Top matches: {count} (showing up to 5 with media previews).
en.enter_numeric_telegram_id: Please enter a numeric telegram user id, or Cancel.
en.user_now_admin: User {user_id} is now a bot admin.
en.user_already_admin: User {user_id} is already a bot admin.
en.application_id_not_found: Application ID not found. Try again or type Cancel.
en.reply_status_update_format:
Reply using:
<Status>|<Territory Village or blank>|<Admin note>|<Agent Tag>|<Performance Potential>|<Internal Remarks>
Example: Approved|Bole 05|Verified docs|Hybrid|High|Fast learner
en.status_update_format_hint: Use format: <Status>|<Territory>|<Admin Note>|<Agent Tag>|<Performance Potential>|<Internal Remarks> or Cancel.
en.first_admin_assigned: You are now the first bot admin.
en.admin_command_active:
Admin command is active. To assign another admin, use:
/addadmin <telegram_user_id>
en.admin_only_assign_admins: Only bot admins can assign admins.
en.territory_help: Send /territory <TownOrVillage> to check if an area is reserved.
en.admin_only_features: Only bot admins can access admin features.
en.filter_instructions:
Send filters in format:
region|applicant_type|status
Use blanks to skip.
Example: Addis Ababa||Under Review
Type Cancel to stop.
en.send_application_id_to_update: Send the application ID you want to update, or type Cancel.
en.send_telegram_user_id_for_admin: Send the telegram user ID to grant admin access, or type Cancel.

am.welcome:
እንኳን ወደ ኢንተር ኢትዮጵያ ሶሉሽንስ የወኪል ምዝገባ ቦት በደህና መጡ

እባክዎ ከታች ካሉት አማራጮች የማመልከቻዎን አይነት ይምረጡ።
am.support:
ለድጋፍ ኢንተር ኢትዮጵያ ሶሉሽንስን ያግኙ
ኢሜይል: agentapply@interethiopia.com
ስልክ: 0911238865 ወይም 0911238865
ዋትስአፕ: 0911238865 ወይም 0911238865
am.choose_language: እባክዎ ቋንቋዎን ይምረጡ / Please choose your language
am.timeline: ቡድናችን በ 3-5 የስራ ቀናት ውስጥ ምላሽ ይሰጥዎታል።
am.status_not_found: እስካሁን ምንም ማመልከቻ አልተገኘም። ለማመልከት /register ይጠቀሙ።
am.yes_no_required: እባክዎ አዎ ወይም አይድለም በማለት ይመልሱ።
am.phone_invalid: የስልክ ቁጥሩ ትክክል አይደለም። እባክዎ +2519XXXXXXXX፣ +2517XXXXXXXX፣ 09XXXXXXXX፣ ወይም 07XXXXXXXX ይጠቀሙ።
am.file_too_large: ፋይሉ በጣም ትልቅ ነው። ከፍተኛው መጠን {size}MB ነው።
am.file_unsupported: ይህ የፋይል አይነት አይፈቀድም። እባክዎ JPG፣ PNG፣ ወይም PDF ይጫኑ።
am.territory_unavailable: ይቅርታ፣ ይህ አካባቢ ተይዟል። እባክዎ ሌላ በአቅራቢያዎ ያለ አካባቢ ይምረጡ።
am.register_choose_type: የማመልከቻዎን አይነት ይምረጡ፦ የሽያጭ ወኪል / ገጣሚ ወኪል / ሽያጭ + ገጣሚ ወኪል
am.admin_menu_text:
የአስተዳዳሪ ማውጫ፦
- የቅርብ ጊዜ ማመልከቻዎችን ማየት
- ማመልከቻዎችን መለየት
- ሁኔታዎችን ማዘመን
- አዲስ አስተዳዳሪ መጨመር
- ዳሽቦርድ ማየት
am.admin_only_management: አስተዳዳሪዎች ብቻ ይህን ማውጫ መጠቀም ይችላሉ።
am.prompt_phone: እባክዎ የሞባይል ስልክ ቁጥርዎን ያስገቡ (ለምሳሌ +2519XXXXXXXX ወይም 09XXXXXXXX)።
am.prompt_experience_years: ካለዎት ስንት ዓመት? ከሌለዎት 0 ብለው ይፃፉ።
am.prompt_id_front: እባክዎ የብሔራዊ መታወቂያዎን የፊት ለፊት ምስል ይጫኑ።
am.prompt_id_back: እባክዎ የብሔራዊ መታወቂያዎን የጀርባ ምስል ይጫኑ።
am.prompt_profile_photo: እባክዎ የፕሮፋይል ፎቶ ይጫኑ (አማራጭ ነው)። ለመዝለል skip ብለው ይፃፉ።
am.admin_filter_format: ይህን ፎርማት ይጠቀሙ፦ ክልል|የወኪል አይነት|ሁኔታ፣ ወይም 'ይቅር' ይበሉ።
am.enter_numeric_telegram_id: እባክዎ የቴሌግራም መለያ ቁጥሩን ያስገቡ፣ ወይም 'ይቅር' ይበሉ።
am.application_id_not_found: የማመልከቻ መለያ ቁጥሩ አልተገኘም። እንደገና ይሞክሩ ወይም 'ይቅር' ይበሉ።
am.reply_status_update_format:
በሚከተለው ፎርማት ይመልሱ፦
<ሁኔታ>|<ግዛት ወይም ባዶ>|<ማስታወሻ>|<የወኪል ታግ>|<አፈፃፀም>|<ውስጣዊ አስተያየት>
ለምሳሌ: Approved|Bole 05|Verified docs|Hybrid|High|Fast learner
am.admin_command_active:
የአስተዳዳሪ ትዕዛዝ ንቁ ነው። ሌላ አስተዳዳሪ ለመጨመር፦
/addadmin <telegram_user_id>
am.admin_only_assign_admins: አስተዳዳሪዎችን መሾም የሚችሉት አስተዳዳሪዎች ብቻ ናቸው።
am.territory_help: የአንድ አካባቢ መያዝ አለመያዙን ለማረጋገጥ /territory <የከተማው ስም> ይላኩ።
am.admin_only_features: አስተዳዳሪዎች ብቻ የአስተዳዳሪ ባህሪያትን ማግኘት ይችላሉ።
am.filter_instructions:
በዚህ ፎርማት ይላኩ፦
ክልል|የማመልከቻ አይነት|ሁኔታ
ለመዝለል ባዶ ይተውት።
ለምሳሌ: Addis Ababa||Under Review
ለማቆም 'ይቅር' ይበሉ።
am.send_application_id_to_update: ሊያዘምኑት የሚፈልጉትን የማመልከቻ መለያ ቁጥር (ID) ይላኩ፣ ወይም 'ይቅር' ይበሉ።
am.send_telegram_user_id_for_admin: የአስተዳዳሪነት ስልጣን ለመስጠት የቴሌግራም መለያ ቁጥሩን ይላኩ፣ ወይም 'ይቅር' ይበሉ።

om.welcome:
Baga gara Botii Galmee Bakka Bu'oota Inter Ethiopia Solutions nagaan dhuftan

Maaloo gosa iyyata keessanii armaan gadii irraa filadhaa.
om.support:
Deeggarsaaf, Inter Ethiopia Solutions qunnamaa
Imeeyilii: agentapply@interethiopia.com
Bilbila: 0911238865 ykn 0911238865
WhatsApp: 0911238865 ykn 0911238865
om.choose_language: Maaloo afaan keessan filadhaa / ቋንቋ ይምረጡ
om.timeline: Garee keenya guyyoota hojii 3-5 gidduutti isiniif deebisa.
om.status_not_found: Iyyanni argame hin jiru. Iyyata galchuuf /register fayyadamaa.
om.status_found:
Haala iyyata keessanii: {status}
Garee keenya dhiyootti isin qunnama.
om.registration_started: Baay'ee gaarii! Galmee keessan haa eግallu.
om.yes_no_required: Maaloo Eeyyee ykn Lakki jettanii deebisaa.
om.phone_invalid: Lakkoofsi bilbilaa sirrii miti. Maaloo +2519XXXXXXXX, +2517XXXXXXXX, 09XXXXXXXX, ykn 07XXXXXXXX fayyadamaa.
om.terms_required: Itti fufuuf 'I Agree' ykn dhaabuuf 'Cancel' jedhaa barreessaa.
om.file_too_large: Faayilli baay'ee gudዳadha. Hammi guddaan {size}MB dha.
om.file_unsupported: Gosti faayilaa kun hin danda'amu. Maaloo JPG, PNG, ykn PDF olka'aa.
om.territory_unavailable: Dhiifama, naannoon kun qabameera. Maaloo naannoo biraa dhiyoo jiru filadhaa.
om.register_choose_type: Gosa iyyata keessanii filadhaa: Bakka Bu'aa Gurgurtaa / Bakka Bu'aa Dhaabbii / Gurgurtaa + Dhaabbii
om.admin_menu_text:
Menu bulchiinsa admin:
- Iyyattoota dhiyoo ilaaluu
- Iyyattoota calaluu
- Haala iyyataa haaromsuu
- Admin ida'uu
- Daashboordii admin
om.admin_only_management: Admin'nii qofti gara bulchiinsaatti seenuu danda'u.
om.prompt_phone: Maaloo lakkoofsa bilbila keessanii galchaa (fkn. +2519XXXXXXXX ykn 09XXXXXXXX).
om.prompt_experience_years: Yoo qabaattan, waggaa meeqa? Yoo hin qabne, 0 barreessaa.
om.prompt_id_front: Maaloo suuraa waraqaa eenyummaa keessanii kan fuulduraa olka'aa.
om.prompt_id_back: Maaloo suuraa waraqaa eenyummaa keessanii kan duubaa olka'aa.
om.prompt_profile_photo: Maaloo suuraa piroofayilii olka'aa (filannoodha). Dabarsuuf 'skip' barreessaa.
om.admin_filter_format: Foormaatii kanaan fayyadamaa: naannoo|gosa_iyyataa|haala, ykn 'Cancel' jedhaa.
om.no_applications_match_filter: Iyyanni calalii keessaniin wal simu hin argamne.
om.enter_numeric_telegram_id: Maaloo ID Telegram lakkoofsaan galchaa, ykn 'Cancel' jedhaa.
om.application_id_not_found: ID Iyyataa hin argamne. Irra deebi'ii yaali ykn 'Cancel' jedhaa.
om.reply_status_update_format:
Foormaatii kanaan deebisaa:
<Haala>|<Naannoo/Ganda>|<Yaada Admin>|<Tag Bakka Bu'aa>|<Dandeettii Raawwii>|<Yaada Keessaa>
Fkn: Approved|Bole 05|Verified docs|Hybrid|High|Fast learner
om.admin_command_active:
Ajeajni admin hojjechaa jira. Admin biraa ida'uuf:
/addadmin <telegram_user_id>
om.admin_only_assign_admins: Admin'nii qofti admin biraa muuduu danda'u.
om.territory_help: Naannoon tokko qabamuu isaa ilaaluuf /territory <MaqaaMagaalaa> ergaa.
om.admin_only_features: Admin'nii qofti dalagaalee admin argachuu danda'u.
om.filter_instructions:
Foormaatii kanaan ergaa:
naannoo|gosa_iyyataa|haala
skip gochuuf duwwaa dhiisaa.
Fkn: Addis Ababa||Under Review
Dhaabuuf 'Cancel' jedhaa.
om.send_application_id_to_update: ID iyyata haaromsuu barbaaddanii ergaa, ykn 'Cancel' jedhaa.
om.send_telegram_user_id_for_admin: ID fayyadamaa admin gochuu barbaaddanii ergaa, ykn 'Cancel' jedhaa.

ti.welcome:
ናብ ኢንተር ኢትዮጵያ ሶሉሽንስ ወኪል ምዝገባ ቦት ብደሓን መጻእኩም

በጃኹም ካብቶም ታሕቲ ዘለዉ መማረፅታት ናይ መመልከቻኹም ዓይነት ይምረጡ።
ti.support:
ንደገፍ፡ ኢንተር ኢትዮጵያ ሶሉሽንስ የዘራርቡ
ኢሜይል: agentapply@interethiopia.com
ስልኪ: 0911238865 ወይ 0911238865
WhatsApp: 0911238865 ወይ 0911238865
ti.timeline: ጉጅለና ኣብ ውሽጢ 3-5 ናይ ስራሕ መዓልታት ምላሽ ክህበኩም እዩ።
ti.status_not_found: ክሳብ ሕዚ ዝተረኽበ መመልከቻ የለን። ንምምልካት /register ይጥቀሙ።
ti.status_found:
ኩነታት መመልከቻኹም: {status}
ጉጅለና ኣብ ቀረባ ግዘ ክረኽበኩም እዩ።
ti.yes_no_required: በጃኹም እወ ወይ ኣይፋልን ኢልኩም ይመልሱ።
ti.phone_invalid: ቑፅሪ ስልኪ ጌጋ እዩ። በጃኹም +2519XXXXXXXX፣ +2517XXXXXXXX፣ 09XXXXXXXX፣ ወይ 07XXXXXXXX ይጥቀሙ።
ti.terms_required: ንቐፃሊ 'እስማማዕ እየ' ወይ ንምቁራፅ 'ይትረፍ' ኢልኩም ፅሓፉ።
ti.file_too_large: ፋይል ብጣዕሚ ዓብዪ እዩ። ዝለዓለ ዓቐን {size}MB እዩ።
ti.file_unsupported: እዚ ዓይነት ፋይል ኣይፍቀድን። በጃኹም JPG፣ PNG፣ ወይ PDF ይፅዓኑ።
ti.territory_unavailable: ይቕሬታ፡ እዚ ከባቢ ተታሒዙ እዩ። በጃኹም ካልእ ብቐረባ ዘሎ ከባቢ ይምረጡ።
ti.register_choose_type: ዓይነት መመልከቻኹም ይምረጡ፦ ወኪል ሸያጭ / ወኪል ገጣሚ / ሸያጭ + ገጣሚ
ti.admin_menu_text:
ማውጫ ኣመሓዳሪ፦
- ቅርብ ግዘ ዝኣተዉ ምርኣይ
- መመልከቻታት ምምያ
- ኩነታት ምሕዳስ
- ኣመሓዳሪ ምውሳኽ
- ዳሽቦርድ ምርኣይ
ti.admin_only_management: ኣመሓደርቲ ጥራሕ እዮም ነዚ ክጥቀሙ ዝኽእሉ።
ti.prompt_experience_years: እንተሃልዩኩም ክንደይ ዓመት? እንተዘይብልኩም 0 ኢልኩም ፅሓፉ።
ti.prompt_has_shop: ዱካን ወይ ናይ ንግዲ ቤት ኣለኩም? (እወ/ኣይፋልን)
ti.prompt_id_front: በጃኹም ናይ ሃገራዊ መታወቂያኹም ናይ ቅድሚት ምስሊ ይፅዓኑ።
ti.prompt_id_back: በጃኹም ናይ ሃገራዊ መታወቂያኹም ናይ ድሕሪት ምስሊ ይፅዓኑ።
ti.prompt_profile_photo: በጃኹም ፎቶ ፕሮፋይል ይፅዓኑ (ኣማራፂ እዩ)። ንምሕላፍ 'skip' ኢልኩም ፅሓፉ።
ti.admin_filter_format: ነዚ ፎርማት ይጥቀሙ፦ ክልል|ዓይነት|ኩነታት፣ ወይ 'ይትረፍ' ይበሉ።
ti.enter_numeric_telegram_id: በጃኹም መፍለይ ቑፅሪ ቴሌግራም የእትዉ፣ ወይ 'ይትረፍ' ይበሉ።
ti.user_now_admin: ተጠቃሚ {user_id} ሕዚ ኣመሓዳሪ ቦት ኮይኑ ኣሎ።
ti.application_id_not_found: መፍለይ ቑፅሪ መመልከቻ ኣይተረኽበን። እንደገና ፈትኑ ወይ 'ይትረፍ' ይበሉ።
ti.reply_status_update_format:
በዚ ፎርማት ይመልሱ፦
<ኩነታት>|<ግዝኣት ወይ ባዶ>|<ማስታወሻ>|<ታግ>|<ኣፈፃፅማ>|<ናይ ውሽጢ ርእይቶ>
ንኣብነት: Approved|Bole 05|Verified docs|Hybrid|High|Fast learner
ti.first_admin_assigned: ንስኹም ናይ መጀመሪያ ኣመሓዳሪ ቦት ኮይንኩም ኣለኹም ።
ti.admin_command_active:
ትእዛዝ ኣመሓዳሪ ንጡፍ እዩ። ካልእ ኣመሓዳሪ ንምውሳኽ፦
/addadmin <telegram_user_id>
ti.admin_only_assign_admins: ኣመሓደርቲ ጥራሕ እዮም ኣመሓደርቲ ክሰይሙ ዝኽእሉ።
ti.territory_help: ሓደ ከባቢ ተታሒዙ እንተኾይኑ ንምፍላጥ /territory <ስም ከተማ> ይልኣኩ።
ti.admin_only_features: ኣመሓደርቲ ጥራሕ እዮም ነዞም ተግባራት ክረኽቡ ዝኽእሉ።
ti.filter_instructions:
በዚ ፎርማት ይልኣኩ፦
ክልል|ዓይነት|ኩነታት
ንምሕላፍ ባዶ ይግደፉ።
ንኣብነት: Addis Ababa||Under Review
ንምቁራፅ 'ይትረፍ' ይበሉ።
ti.send_application_id_to_update: ከተሐድስዎ ትደልዩ መፍለይ ቑፅሪ መመልከቻ (ID) ይልኣኩ፣ ወይ 'ይትረፍ' ይበሉ።
ti.send_telegram_user_id_for_admin: ስልጣን ኣመሓዳሪ ንምሃብ መፍለይ ቑፅሪ ቴሌግራም ይልኣኩ፣ ወይ 'ይትረፍ' ይበሉ።
